texto: The real you is not you
autor: the real you is what is within you. What is behind your joy or your melancholy. What gives you the reason to ponder. What moves or stops you. What makes you you is you
explicacao: Citação de the real you is what is within you. What is behind your joy or your melancholy. What gives you the reason to ponder. What moves or stops you. What makes you you is you sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The real you is not you” articula reflexao, ernest-agyemang-yeboah em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
